name: CSA USB Toolkit
description: Portable toolkit for Control System Advisors (CSAs) at FRC events. Includes essential diagnostic and configuration tools that can be run from a USB drive.

packages.reason: Java runtime needed for WPILib tools.
Glass, OutlineViewer, and other diagnostic tools for field troubleshooting.
Log viewer for diagnosing robot issues at events.
Phoenix Tuner needed for diagnosing CTRE device issues.
REV Hardware Client support for diagnosing REV device issues.
